metadata.title: Moosdesign — 3D prints with character
metadata.description: Handmade 3D prints for makers, collectors and creatives.

hero.title: PRINT YOUR iMAGINATION
hero.subtitle: High-quality 3D prints for makers, collectors and creatives. Every piece is tested and shipped with care.

features.orderDesc: Pick your favourite print from our catalogue.
features.printDesc: Optimized for FDM and resin printers.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Physical 3D prints, ready to ship.
shop.orderSuccess: Thanks for your order! You'll receive a confirmation by email.
shop.orderCancelled: Checkout cancelled — your order was not placed.

customPrints.title: Custom Prints
customPrints.subtitle: Got a unique idea? Tell us about it.
customPrints.descriptionHint: The more details the better — size, material, colour, use case, deadline…
customPrints.fileHint: STL, OBJ or reference images — max. 10 MB
customPrints.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
customPrints.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
customPrints.loginPrompt: Sign in to view your requests.

process.label: What to expect
process.title: How commissions work
process.intro: A straightforward path from idea to printed piece — no surprises along the way.
process.note: We usually reply within 1–2 business days. There’s no obligation until you approve a quote.

brief.title: Brief
brief.body: Tell us your idea — size, material, colour, use case, and deadline. Attach an STL or reference images if you have them.

model.title: Model & quote
model.body: We review your request, suggest FDM or resin, and send a quote. We refine the 3D model until you’re happy to approve.

print.title: Print
print.body: Once approved, we print and inspect every piece. We’ll reach out if anything needs a quick check-in.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.body: Carefully packed and shipped from Belgium. You’ll get tracking when your order leaves the studio.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A selection of prints, renders and client work.

about.title: About Moosdesign
about.subtitle: Creative 3D print studio
about.body: Moosdesign creates physical 3D prints with character — from playful monsters to custom designs. Every piece is carefully printed, checked and shipped.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions? Send us a message.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

details.label: Studio
details.title: Find us
details.intro: Drop by the studio in Ghent, or reach out by email — we’re happy to help with prints, commissions and questions.
details.hoursValue: By appointment — email us to plan a visit.

footer.blurb: Physical 3D prints with character — from playful designs to custom made-to-order pieces.

home.customSubtitle: Send us your idea — we're happy to advise on material, size and finish.

hero.body: Physical 3D prints with character — from playful catalogue pieces to one-of-one commissions. FDM and resin, printed and shipped from Belgium.
hero.asideBody: Commission a unique piece, or browse the ready-made collection.

process.label: Custom work
process.title: YOUR VISION. OUR FILAMENT.
process.body: Send a brief, approve the model, we print and deliver. Simple, direct, no noise.
